description: Style NoteStylish and sweet without looking overtly grown-up, this pair is perfect for the teen who likes to stay abreast of the latest fashion trends. This pair is just right for the latest season's style with pastel shades dominating the ensemble!Product DetailsBlack peep-toe sandal with leather criss-cross strap at the forefront, a toe separator and a strap around the heel counter with a buckle closurePadded footbed with brandingTextured outsole with a wedgeMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
